title: Free Consultation
description: We assess your academic profile, discuss your goals, and identify the best countries and universities for you.

title: Document Preparation
description: We help you gather all required documents, write recommendation letters, and craft compelling personal essays.

title: University Application
description: We submit your applications to up to 3 universities and follow up to ensure everything is processed correctly.

title: Visa & Departure
description: We handle your visa application, prepare you for the interview, and provide pre-departure training for life abroad.
